Senior Backend Engineer — DataFlow Systems

About Us:
DataFlow Systems is a leading provider of real-time data infrastructure solutions. Our platform processes billions of events daily for Fortune 500 companies.

About the Role:
We're looking for a Senior Backend Engineer to join our Platform team. You'll be building the next generation of our event processing pipeline, working with distributed systems at scale.

Requirements:
- 5+ years of experience in backend software development
- Strong proficiency in Python and at least one other backend language (Go preferred)
- Deep experience with distributed systems and microservices architecture
- Hands-on experience with message queues (Kafka, RabbitMQ, or similar)
- Experience with containerization and orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes)
- Strong database skills (PostgreSQL, Redis, or similar)
- Experience building and maintaining CI/CD pipelines
- Excellent problem-solving and communication skills

Preferred Qualifications:
- Experience with real-time data processing frameworks (Apache Spark, Flink, or similar)
- Familiarity with infrastructure-as-code tools (Terraform, Pulumi)
- Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure)
- Track record of mentoring junior engineers
- Experience with event-driven architectures

What We Offer:
- Competitive salary and equity
- Remote-first culture
- Learning and development budget
- Health, dental, and vision insurance
